summary: Completed testing of 4 P0 fixes: Pricing Engine, Campaign savings_amount, Delivery Note, Affiliate resend-activation. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Pricing Engine uses target_margin_pct=30% (not 20%) for calculating sell price, and min_margin_pct=15% for validation. This is by design from category_margin_rules default settings.
Delivery Note bank details hiding is implemented correctly in CanonicalDocumentRenderer.jsx (line 476) with docType !== 'delivery_note' condition
Delivery Note signature areas (Delivered By / Received By) are correctly rendered for delivery_note docType (lines 533-546)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed products and affiliate applications for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 P0 fixes verified working: (1) Pricing Engine at /app/backend/services/pricing_engine.py applies 30% target margin and 15% minimum margin from category_margin_rules. Product creation via POST /api/vendor-ops/products returns margin_pct, margin_amount, pricing_rule_source fields. Override prices below minimum are auto-adjusted with warning. (2) Group Deal campaigns store savings_amount = original_price - discounted_price (discount_pct removed). (3) Delivery Note document hides bank transfer details and shows Delivered By / Received By signature areas instead of Authorized By. (4) Affiliate resend-activation works for status=approved OR activation_status=sent/expired.

frontend_ui_tests: Group Deals page - 18 green savings badges displayed (Save TZS X)
Admin Orders page - 304 orders listed, order detail panel working
Vendor Ops Products page - loading correctly

pricing_engine.details: calculate_sell_price() applies 30% target margin from category_margin_rules default. Override prices validated against 15% minimum margin. Below-minimum overrides auto-adjusted with warning. Product creation returns margin_pct, margin_amount, pricing_rule_source fields.

campaign_savings_amount.details: POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns stores savings_amount = round(original_price - discounted_price). discount_pct field removed from response.

delivery_note_document.details: CanonicalDocumentRenderer.jsx conditionally hides bank transfer details when docType='delivery_note' (line 476). Shows 'Delivered By' and 'Received By' signature areas instead of 'Authorized By' (lines 533-546).

affiliate_resend_activation.details: POST /api/affiliate-applications/{id}/resend-activation works for status='approved' OR activation_status in ('sent', 'expired'). Blocks non-approved applications with 400 error. Multiple resends allowed.
